commit_scope: Move the next BML compiler/source-lowering slice into high-level BML classes and templates, with a minimal Form proof bridge that carries parsed BML declarations into compiler-object sections.

local_validation.notes: The design slice is in BML source: CompilerCarrier, CompilerDeclaration<T>, CompilerSectionModel<T>, CompilerUnitModel<T>, SourceLowerer<TSource,TDeclaration,TCarrier>, BMLDeclarationLoweringStage<TDeclaration,TCarrier>, BMLSourceLoweringFlow<TSource,TDeclaration,TCarrier>, and SelfHostingPlan. The Form change only exposes those BML class bodies to the existing bootstrap parser and proves carrier packaging until the BML compiler executes the flow itself.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The BML compiler picture now has BML-owned source-lowering architecture and a sibling-kernel proof that parsed BML declarations are carried as compiler-object sections for declarations, templates, language ports, and the bootstrap boundary.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-lowering-carrier-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This makes BML source carry the lowering model and proves carrier packaging. Full self-hosted execution of the BML lowering flow and retirement of the Form proof bridge remain next.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/bml/bmf-bml-compiler-picture.bml now carries the source-lowering model as BML interfaces, classes, templates, generics, and multiline methods.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-lowering-carrier-proof.fk parses that BML source and proves 41 carrier/lowering claims across Go, Rust, and TypeScript.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk only extends the bootstrap parser body-enabled list so the new BML classes are visible to proof.
kernels/BMF_BML_COMPILER_PICTURE.md names the proof bridge as temporary and the next refinement as executing the BML-owned lowering flow from BML itself.
